response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role — a Staff/Senior engineer with 20+ years of experience including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS. Technical fit is excellent, but seniority mismatch raises real concerns about retention, salary expectations, and willingness to take a junior IC position. Berlin-based which satisfies on-site requirement. Worth a screening call to understand motivation for applying to an entry-level role.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple Berlin companies
AI/LLM and MCP tooling experience aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff-level candidate for entry-level role suggests likely short tenure or compensation gap
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB/GraphQL instead)
Only basic German, which may matter for renewable energy/construction domain with German clients
